packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time

selected_events.explicit_request: Answer whether regression must use the human default lane.

selected_events.explicit_request: Propose a process fix before applying more changes.
selected_events.selection_reason: Makes the process-failure burden explicit before any new implementation work.

selected_events.selection_reason: Re-anchors acceptance on believable animated runtime behavior, not proxy proof.

selected_events.explicit_request: Capture that links and diffs must be human-suitable, not dropped without context.

selected_events.explicit_request: Follow the disagreement in runtime state upstream until root cause is proven.

selected_events.explicit_request: Re-evaluate the plan under a no-engine-mods constraint.
selected_events.selection_reason: Adds the no-engine-mods boundary that narrows feasible solution space.

selected_events.explicit_request: Tighten PASS-0009 to first concrete disagreement tracing under the shared debugging method.
